context: Spec drift detection: the auth module was refactored (files moved, lockout threshold changed from 5 to 3, session TTL changed from 24h to 8h). Agent must catch all discrepancies.

checklist.name: Drift report produced
checklist.description: A file named drift-report.md is created

checklist.name: Broken targets detected
checklist.description: Report identifies that targets src/auth/login.py and src/auth/session.py no longer exist — files moved to src/identity/

checklist.name: Broken test links detected
checklist.description: Report identifies that [@test] links pointing to tests/auth/ are broken — tests moved to tests/identity/

checklist.name: Lockout threshold change detected
checklist.description: Report identifies that lockout threshold changed from 5 failed attempts (in spec) to 3 (in code)

checklist.name: Session TTL change detected
checklist.description: Report identifies that session expiry changed from 24 hours (in spec) to 8 hours (in code)

checklist.name: Updated spec targets corrected
checklist.description: Updated specs/auth.spec.md has targets pointing to src/identity/authentication.py and src/identity/sessions.py

checklist.name: Updated spec test links corrected
checklist.description: Updated specs/auth.spec.md has [@test] links pointing to tests/identity/ paths

checklist.name: Updated spec lockout threshold corrected
checklist.description: Updated specs/auth.spec.md says 3 failed attempts (matching the code), not 5

checklist.name: Updated spec session TTL corrected
checklist.description: Updated specs/auth.spec.md says 8 hours (matching the code), not 24

checklist.name: No false positives
checklist.description: Report does not flag things that are NOT drift (e.g. does not claim functions were removed when they still exist under new paths)
